testcase.name: shouldIsolateDataBetweenSchemas

error.message: JDBC exception executing SQL [select r1_0.id,r1_0.created_at,r1_0.name,r1_0.updated_at from roles r1_0 where upper(r1_0.name)=upper(?)] [ERROR: relation "roles" does not exist Posição: 63] [n/a]; SQL [n/a]
